plugins.name: claudit
plugins.description: Audit and optimize your Claude Code configuration. Caches current Claude Code ecosystem knowledge so any subsequent agent task — building a skill, configuring an MCP, authoring CLAUDE.md — can read it instead of re-fetching docs.

plugins.name: commventional
plugins.description: Enforce conventional commits, conventional comments, and engineering ownership for commits, PRs, and code reviews

plugins.name: towncrier
plugins.description: Emit a structured JSON event for every Claude Code hook to a configurable transport (file, fifo, or HTTP).

plugins.name: avanti
plugins.description: SDLC in markdown — authors plans, tickets, ADRs, and pulse entries; drives lifecycle transitions

plugins.name: inkwell
plugins.description: Documentation toolkit for Claude Code: write, search, query (with code corroboration), and tidy docs in a repo's `docs/` tree.
